zh.lifeSummary: Franci S Jennens是Roberd Jennens的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Franci S Jennens是Roberd Jennens的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Jennens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Jennings
meanings: English: variant of Jenning , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
German: patronymic from a pet form (see Jenning ) of the personal name Johannes (see John ).

nameMeanings.name: Franci
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Franci S Jennens was born as the son of Roberd Jennens. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Franci S Jennens est né, fils de Roberd Jennens. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Franci S Jennens wurde, als Sohn von Roberd Jennens geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Franci S Jennens è nato il come figlio di Roberd Jennens. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Franci S JennensはRoberd Jennensの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Franci S Jennens(은)는 Roberd Jennens의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Franci S Jennens nasceu filho de Roberd Jennens. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Franci S Jennens родился. Его отца звали Roberd Jennens. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Franci S Jennens nació como hijo de Roberd Jennens. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
